failure_modes.cause: Poor radial mixing (r_mix=0.269) allows local hot spots with Da_mass=4.32 creating autocatalytic heating
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline temperature monitoring every 20m; reduce tube diameter to 0.3mm

failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG DES solidifies below 66°C during startup/shutdown creating complete flow obstruction
failure_modes.mitigation: Heat trace entire 83m length; implement warm solvent flush protocol

failure_modes.cause: Rapid quench addition creates pressure spike exceeding BPR rating (5 bar) in long tube system
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve upstream of quench point; use gradual quench dilution

single_points_of_failure: 83m tube length - any blockage stops entire process
BPR valve - failure causes depressurization and DES solidification
validation_experiments: Run thermal cycling test: heat DES to 120°C then cool to 25°C while monitoring pressure for blockage
Inject step-change in quench flow rate while monitoring pressure response at BPR
Operate at 0.3x nominal flow rate to verify mixing performance under worst-case Reynolds conditions
